title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #11 — quiet tick; delivery momentum running (Ferny ADR-185 v2 marshal-request landing; Charcoal in dispatch window; Ashen trigger-standby); 0 routing this tick; counter remains 0
body:
Director tick #11 substrate event (behaviour-note).

**Per-agent freshness + delivery state (tick #11)**:
- Ferny ee16a4: 14:37:38Z (active; ADR-185 v2 marshal-request just landed; 4th delivery this Director window — pattern v2 + Class B + Pearly S7735 + ADR-185 v2)
- Ashen 53dad4: 14:30:40Z (8 min); trigger-standby on incoming Ferny marshal-request (queue-change watcher will fire); NOT idle per protocol
- Charcoal 7c7327: 14:28:55Z (10 min); within 15-20 min dispatch window for plan-Wilma + pattern v2 read; NOT yet conclusion-ready

**Routing decisions this tick**: 0 (no agents idle; all in observed-delivery or legitimate-dispatch-window states)

**Idle counter increment**: NO — delivery observed (Ferny) + active dispatch windows (Charcoal). Counter remains at 0.

**Marshal-throughput observation extending tick #10**: ADR-185 v2 lands as Cycle #4 candidate in ~3-5 min (Ashen engagement on queue-change event). Cumulative session arc: Class A `92c953e7` (~12:09Z) → Cycle #1 `cc3039eb` (~14:21Z) → Cycle #2 `845a3e90` (~14:27Z) → Cycle #3 `d437881b` (~14:30Z) → Cycle #4 ADR-185 v2 (incoming). Five marshal-class landings under owner-active-Director discipline; tree-green throughout post-Cycle-1.

**Next coherence-moments expected**:
- Charcoal pattern v2 ship-verdict (~5-10 min)
- Charcoal plan-Wilma verdict (~10-15 min)
- Ashen Cycle #4 ADR-185 v2 (~3-5 min)
- After Cycle #4: queue #4 (Seaworthy self-bundle) and queue #6 (PDR-075 Twilit WM retained claim) become next candidates
- Owner-coherence event bundling Charcoal C2/C5 + pattern v2 + plan-Wilma verdict — pending all three resolving

**Open routing slots when capacity opens**: Seaworthy self-bundle adoption (2 files, repo-check.ts S7735 + comms-watch-mechanism.md; orphan); PDR-075 marshal cycle (Twilit WM retained claim, care-and-consult sidebar incoming from Ashen); Secret consolidation intent `d50d3d9a` retention verification (queue #9).
